title: Composite collection of Pigeonpea.
abstract:
As part of Generation Challenge Program, to create a public platform that will use molecular
methods to unlock genetic diversity and put it to use in better crops for the world’s poorest
farmers, a global composite collection comprising 1000 accessions representing the 13,632
germplasm accessions that are conserved at ICRISAT genebank was developed (Table 3). The
composite collection include elite germplasm, released cultivars,
